Uses of Package
liquibase.configuration

  • Packages that use liquibase.configuration 
    Package Description
    liquibase
    Liquibase top level namespace package.
    liquibase.command  
    liquibase.configuration  
    liquibase.configuration.core  
    liquibase.extension.testing  
    liquibase.extension.testing.setup  
    liquibase.extension.testing.testsystem  
    liquibase.hub  
    liquibase.integration.commandline  
    liquibase.integration.servlet  
    liquibase.logging.core  
    liquibase.parser  
    liquibase.sql  
  • Classes in liquibase.configuration used by liquibase 
    Class and Description
    AutoloadedConfigurations
    Marker interface for a class containing ConfigurationDefinition which should be auto-loaded at Liquibase startup.
    ConfigurationDefinition
    A higher-level/detailed definition to provide type-safety, metadata, default values, etc..
  • Classes in liquibase.configuration used by liquibase.command 
    Class and Description
    ConfigurationValueConverter
    Used by ConfigurationDefinition.getCurrentConfiguredValue() to translate whatever object type a ConfigurationValueProvider is returning into the object type the definition uses.
    ConfigurationValueObfuscator
    Used by ConfigurationDefinition.getCurrentValueObfuscated() to obfuscate the current value.
    ConfiguredValue
    This wraps all the ProvidedValues to return the overall value returned from the collection of ConfigurationValueProviders.
  • Classes in liquibase.configuration used by liquibase.configuration 
    Class and Description
    AbstractConfigurationContainer
    Deprecated. 
    Use new ConfigurationDefinition style
    AbstractConfigurationContainer.ConfigurationContainer
    Deprecated.  
    AbstractConfigurationValueProvider
    Convenience base class for ConfigurationValueProvider implementations
    ConfigurationContainer
    Deprecated. 
    interface from old style configuration code. Use ConfigurationDefinition and AutoloadedConfigurations now.
    ConfigurationDefinition
    A higher-level/detailed definition to provide type-safety, metadata, default values, etc..
    ConfigurationDefinition.Building 
    ConfigurationProperty
    Deprecated.  
    ConfigurationValueConverter
    Used by ConfigurationDefinition.getCurrentConfiguredValue() to translate whatever object type a ConfigurationValueProvider is returning into the object type the definition uses.
    ConfigurationValueHandler
    Deprecated.  
    ConfigurationValueObfuscator
    Used by ConfigurationDefinition.getCurrentValueObfuscated() to obfuscate the current value.
    ConfigurationValueProvider
    Defines a way for LiquibaseConfiguration to find configured values.
    ConfiguredValue
    This wraps all the ProvidedValues to return the overall value returned from the collection of ConfigurationValueProviders.
    GlobalConfiguration
    Deprecated. 
    use GlobalConfiguration
    LiquibaseConfiguration
    Provides unified management of configuration properties within Liquibase core and in extensions.
    ProvidedValue
    Describes a value found from a provider.
  • Classes in liquibase.configuration used by liquibase.configuration.core 
    Class and Description
    AbstractConfigurationValueProvider
    Convenience base class for ConfigurationValueProvider implementations
    AbstractMapConfigurationValueProvider
    Convenience class for ConfigurationValueProviders that can collect the possible values into a Map.
    ConfigurationDefinition
    A higher-level/detailed definition to provide type-safety, metadata, default values, etc..
    ConfigurationValueProvider
    Defines a way for LiquibaseConfiguration to find configured values.
    ProvidedValue
    Describes a value found from a provider.

    Class and Description
    AbstractConfigurationValueProvider
    Convenience base class for ConfigurationValueProvider implementations
    AbstractMapConfigurationValueProvider
    Convenience class for ConfigurationValueProviders that can collect the possible values into a Map.
    ConfigurationValueProvider
    Defines a way for LiquibaseConfiguration to find configured values.

    ConfigurationValueProvider
    Defines a way for LiquibaseConfiguration to find configured values.

    Used by ConfigurationDefinition.getCurrentConfiguredValue() to translate whatever object type a ConfigurationValueProvider is returning into the object type the definition uses.
